Component of current liabilities, not the total.

candidates.why: Candidate list item, but blank and less specific than the reported current debt line.

candidates.row_label: Current portion of liabilities to credit institutions and investors

Current debt total, but likely includes lease liabilities, which should be excluded in baseline STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current portion of liabilities to credit institutions and investors

variables.notes: Chose outside the shortlist because it is the clearest current debt line excluding leases; avoided 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' since it appears to include 'Financial leasing, current portion' and baseline STD excludes leases.

candidates.why: Closest and likely intended current taxes payable/current tax liabilities line on the balance sheet.
Tax-related but noncurrent deferred taxes, not taxes payable.
Asset, opposite of taxes payable.

variables.notes: No candidate was provided, but this is a confident balance-sheet match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Net PPE component representing property used in operations.
Net PPE component representing plant and equipment.
Could be a PPE component, but blank in preview.
Could be a PPE component, but blank in preview.
Cash flow line, not a balance-sheet PPE stock.
Intangible, not PPE.

variables.notes: No single total PPE line is shown. Selected the main net tangible fixed-asset components on the balance sheet and excluded right-of-use assets and intangibles. Manual review is warranted because a complete reported total PPE line is not explicitly available and there may be additional PPE components in some years.

candidates.why: Direct match to total assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities INVESTING ACTIVITIES
candidates.why: Despite the odd combined label, the values equal operating cash flow after working-capital changes and before investing activities.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not the final operating cash flow measure.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities INVESTING ACTIVITIES

variables.notes: Chosen as the net cash flow from operating activities; the label is malformed but the values reconcile to operating cash flow.
